    """
    # Initialize the queue with the start node and its distance
    queue = [(start, [start])]
    # Initialize the set of visited nodes
    visited = set()

    while queue:
        # Get the next node and its path
        node, path = queue.pop(0)
        # Check if the node has been visited
        if node in visited:
            continue
        # Mark the node as visited
        visited.add(node)
        # Check if the node is the end node
        if node == end:
            return path
